title: Read-only L0 Discovery Advisor Contract
objective: Define and implement a read-only advisor layer that turns existing L0 diagnostics and simulator output into explicit L0 discovery suggestions without changing context selection, provider prompts, or repository state.
proposed_change: Introduce a diagnostic-only L0 discovery advisor contract, likely under manifest.diagnostics.l0_discovery_advisor, that can consume selected context manifest item IDs, L0 candidate diagnostics, and/or l0_retrieval_simulator output to produce suggested include_l0 chunk IDs with reasons. The advisor remains advisory only: selection_effect is fixed to "none", suggestions are not added to ContextPackManifest.items, and provider prompt paths remain unchanged.
rationale: GAP-0001 remains open after explicit inclusion, candidate diagnostics, and hybrid simulator work.
The next smallest step is an advisory contract before any automatic selection adapter is admitted.
An advisor can make low-risk discovery behavior observable while preserving the no-selection-effect boundary.
The existing simulator and candidate diagnostics provide enough evidence to design suggestion semantics without live retrieval.
Future automatic context inclusion should be gated by a separate PLAN/WARRANT after advisory evidence exists.
constraints: No automatic context selection and no mutation of ContextPackManifest.items.
No provider prompt inclusion or prompt rendering changes.
No live retrieval against production indexes.
No external embedding API calls and no production embedding creation.
No vector index, document index, memory store, or repository write-back beyond explicit output artifacts requested by CLI users.
No reranking beyond existing literal/implicit reranker none semantics.
No token-budget enforcement or token-budget telemetry.
No cross-namespace access, namespace ACL bypass, or redaction-boundary bypass.
selection_effect must remain fixed to "none" for advisor output and every suggested candidate.
Any later automatic inclusion adapter requires a separate PLAN/WARRANT.
success_criteria: A schema or validator accepts read-only l0_discovery_advisor records with selection_effect none.
Advisor suggestions include chunk IDs, reasons, source diagnostic references, and explicit non-selection semantics.
Tests prove suggestions do not alter context selection, provider prompt construction, or existing simulator/candidate diagnostic behavior.
CLI or module output can be produced from explicit files/fixtures/read-only diagnostics only.
Guardrails show zero writes, zero index mutations, zero embedding creations, and no prompt or context item changes.
SELF_MODEL records the result as advisory/diagnostic and does not claim automatic context inclusion.
risk: Suggested include_l0 IDs may be mistaken for automatic selection decisions unless the contract, tests, and warrant keep advisory output separate from ContextPackManifest.items and provider prompt construction.
next_action: Implement the read-only L0 discovery advisor contract under the admitted constraints: advisory output only, selection_effect none, no context selection mutation, no provider prompt change, no live retrieval, no external embedding API calls, no embedding/index/document-store mutation, no token-budget telemetry/enforcement, no non-none reranking, and no automatic include_l0 behavior.
